channel.title: Interface Design on Travis Beckham
channel.description: Recent content in Interface Design on Travis Beckham

item.description: Mapbox has an interesting idea that helps people decide where to go based on direction/time, not literal geography. The map directions are only displayed once a destination is selected.

I love The Engine, a site recently launched by MIT. The attention to detail is perfect; it's easy to explore, yet not boring. It also looks fantastic on all devices. Illustration and animation by Vasjen Katro.
